_comment: Human verdicts: composer pairs ttn_composer_duplicates.py flagged as candidate same-person splits but that are NOT merges (genuinely distinct people sharing a date-span and a similar name, e.g. the Bach cousins, the Jarnefelt brothers). Each entry is a sorted [name_a, name_b]; the finder drops these on subsequent runs. Append via: uv run ttn_composer_duplicates.py --reject "Name A|Name B".
rejected: Andante from Trio for Piano and Strings No 1
Finale from Trio for piano and strings No 1
